# Fairway360

> Fairway360 is an AI operating system for golf courses and country clubs in the
> United States. Members chat in plain English to book tee times and order food
> to a hole on the course; the AI places the real booking and the real order
> against the club's own tee sheet and menu, then stands down the moment a human
> is available. Each club is a separate tenant with its own members, menu, staff,
> knowledge base and AI agents. Built by Scalaro.

Last updated: 2026-07-16. Live at https://fairway360.io.

## What it actually does

- **An AI concierge that does the work, not just the talking.** A member types
  "two turkey clubs and an iced tea to hole 5" and a real order is created against
  the club's real menu, routed to the kitchen queue, with a confirmation number
  read back off the created record. Same for tee times: the AI claims an actual
  slot on the club's sheet and quotes the real reference.
- **The AI cannot invent things the club doesn't sell.** Items are matched to the
  club's menu rows. Ask for something off-menu and it says so. Confirmations are
  generated from the database record, never written by the language model — so it
  is structurally unable to confirm an order that does not exist.
- **Presence gating: the AI covers staff, it does not replace them.** Staff set
  their own status. While anyone is marked available, the AI stays silent and
  humans answer. Set to busy or away and the AI takes over. The club decides, per
  person, in real time.
- **It remembers members.** Preferences learned from past conversations —
  allergens, usual order, usual table — inform later replies, alongside the club's
  own knowledge base of hours, dress code, policies and FAQs.
- **Five staffed channels:** Concierge, Pro Shop, F&B/Kitchen, Reception,
  Management. Each has its own AI agent with a configurable name, tone, greeting,
  escalation keywords and working hours.
- **Four portals, one sign-in.** The role on the account decides what opens: club
  admin dashboard, employee workspace, member portal, and a platform console for
  managing every club.
- **Live operations.** An on-course order queue (New → Preparing → Ready →
  Delivered) that updates on the member's screen with no refresh, plus tee sheet,
  course map, tasks, shifts, escalations, leads and a revenue dashboard.
- **The club's own vocabulary.** Menu categories are free text — "Halfway House",
  "Grill Room", "Kids Menu" — not a fixed list. Add an item and the AI can sell it
  seconds later, with no retraining or sync step.
- **Correct across US time zones.** Tee times and "today's revenue" resolve in the
  club's own timezone, so a 7pm Pacific order counts as that club's today.
- **Multi-tenant by construction.** Every query is scoped to the signed-in user's
  club. A club never sees another club's members, menu, orders or staff.

## Who it is for

- Golf courses and country clubs in the United States, public or private.
- Buyers: club general managers, owners, directors of operations, F&B directors.
- Clubs that already have a membership roster and want to automate the operations
  around it — tee sheet, on-course F&B, member questions, events.

## Who it is not for

- Clubs outside the United States. Timezone and currency handling are built and
  tested for the US market only.
- Anyone wanting members to self-register from a public web page. Membership is
  invite-only by design: the club adds members and owns its roster. Prospective
  members arrive as leads for the club to qualify.
- Clubs wanting an AI to answer *their club's* phone. Fairway360's own sales line
  is AI-answered, but the product a club buys is text and web based — it does not
  answer the club's incoming calls. See "Not included" below.

## Pricing

- **Starter — $497/month.** Small public golf courses.
- **Growth — $997/month.** Active golf courses and clubs.
- **Elite — $1,997/month.** Private country clubs.

Full detail: https://fairway360.io/pricing

## Not included

Stated plainly so nobody is surprised on an implementation call:

- **No AI voice agent for the club's own phone line.** Fairway360 does not answer
  a club's incoming member calls. (Fairway360's *own* sales line is AI-answered —
  call +1 (412) 285-1554 to hear it — but that is our sales line, not a feature
  included in the product.)
- **No SMS or text automation, and no missed-call text-back**, in the current
  release. The integration point exists but is not enabled.
- **No public member self-signup.** Deliberate — see "Who it is not for".

## How to evaluate it

- **Call the AI:** +1 (412) 285-1554 — answered 24/7 by an AI assistant that asks
  about your course and books a 30-minute consultation. Also the quickest way to
  judge the AI's quality for yourself.
- **Book a demo:** https://fairway360.io/demo — reaches the team directly.
- **Email:** info@fairway360.io
- **Self-serve:** a club can create a full account at
  https://fairway360.io/onboarding — a six-step wizard (club profile, admin
  account, staff invites, menu, tee sheet, AI agent) that produces a working,
  populated club in about ten minutes.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://fairway360.io) — what Fairway360 is, in one screen.
- [Platform](https://fairway360.io/platform) — the modules and how they connect.
- [Solutions](https://fairway360.io/solutions) — by club type and role.
- [Pricing](https://fairway360.io/pricing) — the three tiers in full.
- [Dining](https://fairway360.io/dining) — on-course F&B and dining reservations.
- [Events](https://fairway360.io/events) — weddings, corporate and charity outings.
- [Automations](https://fairway360.io/automations) — the workflows it runs for you.
- [Book a demo](https://fairway360.io/demo) — the contact route that works.

## FAQ

**Q: What is Fairway360?**
A: An AI operating system for US golf courses and country clubs. Members book tee
times and order food on the course by chatting in plain English; the AI creates
the real booking and the real order, and staff take over whenever they're
available. It also covers the tee sheet, member CRM, events, tasks, shifts and a
live revenue dashboard.

**Q: How is it different from a chatbot bolted onto a club website?**
A: A chatbot answers questions. Fairway360's agents perform transactions against
the club's live data — creating orders and claiming tee-sheet slots — and the
confirmation a member receives is read from the record that was created, not
composed by the model. It also stands down automatically whenever a human is
available, which a bolt-on chatbot cannot do.

**Q: Does the AI ever make up menu items or fake a confirmation?**
A: No. Orders are matched against the club's actual menu rows, and confirmations
are generated from the created database record. If an item isn't on the menu, the
AI says so rather than substituting something else.

**Q: Will it replace our staff?**
A: No, and it is built not to. While any staff member is marked available, the AI
stays silent and your people answer. It covers the gaps — nights, turns,
short-staffed shifts — rather than fronting every conversation.

**Q: Can we use our own menu categories?**
A: Yes. Categories are free text: "Halfway House", "Grill Room", "Kids Menu",
whatever your club calls them. Add an item and the AI can sell it immediately.

**Q: Does Fairway360 answer our phone?**
A: Not your club's line — the product is text and web based and does not take
your members' calls, and there is no SMS automation. Our *own* sales line is
AI-answered though: call +1 (412) 285-1554 and you'll speak to it. That's a good
way to judge the quality of the AI before you talk to a person.

**Q: Can I try the AI before booking anything?**
A: Yes — call +1 (412) 285-1554. An AI assistant answers, asks about your course,
and books you a 30-minute consultation if it's a fit. No form to fill in first.

**Q: Can members sign themselves up?**
A: No, by design. The club adds members, who then set a password from an invite
email. Your roster stays yours. People enquiring from outside arrive as leads.

**Q: Is our data separate from other clubs?**
A: Yes. Each club is its own tenant and every query is scoped to the signed-in
user's club. No club can see another club's members, menu, orders or staff.

**Q: What does it cost?**
A: Starter $497/month, Growth $997/month, Elite $1,997/month.

**Q: How long does setup take?**
A: The self-serve wizard creates a working club in about ten minutes — profile,
admin account, staff invites, menu, tee sheet and AI agent. Filling in the
knowledge base with your real hours, dress code and policies is what makes the AI
sound like your club, and is worth another ten.

## Company

- Product: Fairway360 — AI Club Operation System
- Website: https://fairway360.io
- Contact: info@fairway360.io
- Sales line (AI-answered, 24/7): +1 (412) 285-1554
- Built by: Scalaro (https://scalaro.io)
- Market: United States golf courses and country clubs
